_publications._publicationTitle: Selective nitration of Hsp90 acts as a metabolic switch promoting tumor cell proliferation.

_contextSnippet: selective and highly specific antibodies we developed against Hsp90 nitrated at either Y33 or Y56...Hsp90 nitrated on Y56 represented 7.9 ± 1.9 % of total Hsp90
details: Selective and highly specific antibodies against Hsp90 nitrated at Y33 or Y56 successfully detected endogenous nitrated Hsp90 levels: NY56 represented 7.9±1.9% of total Hsp90 in VS and 11.4±3.0% in cultured cells; NY33 represented 12.3±6.7% in VS and ~1.0% in cultured cells
